# CWE-455: process exits when security-relevant TLS material cannot load.
lang: go
file: CWE-455-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/tls"
	"log"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func StartAPI() *gin.Engine {
	cert, err := tls.LoadX509KeyPair("/etc/hsm/tls.crt", "/etc/hsm/tls.key")
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("hsm tls required at startup: %v", err)
	}
	_ = cert
	return gin.Default()
}
